mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_fund_record WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_fund_record SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT pi.leader_id FROM project_info pi INNER JOIN project_fund_record pf ON pi.id = pf.project_id WHERE pf.id = #{fundId} AND pf.del_flag = 0
